extensions.name: NuCore AI Hebcal Extension
extensions.description: Extension that integrates Hebcal's API to provide Jewish calendar data, including holidays, parashot, and candle lighting times.
extensions.author: Michel Kohanim

extensions.name: NuCore AI URL Fetcher Extension
extensions.description: Extension that fetches data from URLs and APIs, providing a flexible way to integrate external data sources.
extensions.author: Michel Kohanim
